text:
Hello,

Thank you for your interest into devel/p5-ReadLine-TTYtter and for the
patch Anders.
This is a duplicate work, an update has already been submitted.
Please next time check the PR database before submit an update.

Jason, this patch has to be rejected: it's a duplicate from ports/174704.
